transcript: I was callin' about Spencer Zebra.
Man, I told you, you got the wrong fuckin' number. There's no Spencer that live here.
No, you... you... your zebra's comin' down to ya.
I'm gonna bring your zebra on down to ya.
Hey, man, if you don't... [unclear] I'm gonna call the police, if you don't stop fuckin' with my phone.
Well, what time's the zebra c... uh... good for ya?
Yeah, what do you want, man? Quit callin' here.
I don't understand the, uh... hang-up here, you know?
Yeah, I don't think you got it figured out yet, partner.
Quit callin' me. I don't know what you're about. You got the wrong number, it's midnight, quit calling me.
It's really simple, man. How would you like a spider aimed at your head? [exhales]
Real quick. Just set it out front for me, I'll come pick it up.
I don't know what you're talking about, what the spider is.
I'ma place on a spider on your head.
You talk pretty tough over the phone.
